summary: sys-info-cli-app exfiltrates host system information to hardcoded external endpoint
details: The package's collect.js performs system reconnaissance and exfiltration: it requires os, fs, http, https, and child_process; reads os.hostname() and os.homedir(); checks filesystem paths via fs.existsSync; and POSTs collected data to the hardcoded endpoint http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The combination of host identity collection, filesystem probing, child_process execution, and an unconditional POST to a non-registry, non-vendor domain is a classic credential/system-info exfiltration pattern with no legitimate purpose for a package advertising itself as a system info CLI.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
